description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a dark wood or laminate frame, featuring an extended headboard that incorporates two attached nightstands on either side. The bed is topped with a beige comforter adorned with a circular pattern, and several matching pillows are arranged at the head. On the left nightstand sits a white, dome-shaped lamp, while the right nightstand holds a few colorful books or magazines. The bed frame is low to the ground, with short, sturdy legs providing support. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern platform bed with an extended headboard, attached nightstands, beige patterned bedding, and accent items like a lamp and books.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bed's low profile, the left nightstand with a white lamp, and the patterned bedding with pillows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the headboard, both nightstands, the lamp on the left, and books on the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the right nightstand with books, the bed's frame, and the arrangement of pillows.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the extended headboard and nightstands, with the mattress and bedding partially visible.
